characters.description: 224Biological informationSpeciesDroidGenderMasculine programmingBiographic informationHomeworldUnknownOccupation/RankCommanderAffiliationSeparatists 224was a battle droid that held command over a battalion for the Droid Army during theClone Wars. After a recent promotion, 224 assumed leadership of a battalion of droids with the objective of hunting downJedi MasterYoda. The goal was to demonstrate toKatuunkoon behalf ofDooku, the superiority of the Droid Army over the Republic. However, 224 quickly encountered a set back as that the droids under his command were slow in following orders. Eventually locating the Jedi, 224 promptly reported the discovery toAsajj Ventress, in response, Ventress ordered his execution. However before he could act, Yoda sprang into action and effortlessly decimated half of the battalion. Yoda then proceeded to slice through the underside of 224's tank, prompting the droids within to attempt to flee. Yoda swiftly eliminated all of them and, as a message to Katuunko, tossed 224's remains into the air.

99Biological informationSpeciesHuman(Clone)GenderMaleDied21 BBYBiographic informationHomeworldKaminoOccupation/RankKamino maintenance dutyAffiliationGalactic Republic 99was a clone who lived during theClone Wars. He was malformed during the cloning process and demoted to the maintenance crew. During early21 BBY, 99 befriendedHevyand helped him during histeam's struggle to get in the army. Hevy succeeded and passed the test and was shipped out to Rishi Moon. He was given Hevy's medal of honor and was made a promise to keep in touch. As Hevy died during the Battle of the Rishi Moon, this promise was never kept when he sacrificed himself to warn the Republic fleet of an impending Confederate invasion.

characters.name: Aang
characters.description: AangBiological informationSpeciesRoonanGenderMaleBiographic informationOccupation/RankSenatorAffiliationGalactic RepublicGalactic SenateMilitary Oversight Committee Aangwas aRoonanSenatorduring theClone Wars. He was sought after byPadmé Amidalafor voting on an upcoming bill. Padmé held a party for him to win his vote, thecoup de graceof which was aJogan Fruitcake. Adoring the cake, Aang gave Amidala his vote full-heartedly, solidifying a new senatorial alliance. The Roonan male Aang lived during the last decades of theGalactic Republic's rule. He became a senator of the Republic Senate, which was based on the galactic capital,Coruscant. He eventually attained a seat on the Senate Military Oversight Committee, a bureau affiliated with the operations of the Republic Military. By the time of theClone Wars, his vote on the committee was considered to be decisive.

characters.name: Agruss
characters.description: AgrussBiological informationSpeciesZygerrianGenderMaleBiographic informationHomeworldZygerriaOccupation/RankKeeper ofZygerrian Labor Processing HubAffiliationZygerrian Slave EmpireZygerrian Slavers GuildConfederacy of Independent Systems Agrusswas a maleZygerrianwho served as the keeper of theZygerrian Labor Processing HubonKadavo. WhenObi-Wan Kenobi wasimprisoned there, the Keeper was an obese man confined to a hoverchair. Agruss was considered to have an extremely cruel nature, so common amongst slavers choosing to "dispose" of unruly slaves. While Kenobi was held there, the Jedi Master watched him drop several Togruta slaves into the lava under the Processing Hub. When Anakin Skywalker leads the Republic forces on a rescue mission, Keeper Agruss tried to send all of the slaves into the lava pits below them to deny the Jedi the chance to save them. Most of the Togruta were saved byPlo Koon,Ahsoka Tano, CommanderWolffe, and theWolfpacktroopers. He was held at the point of Obi-Wan's lightsaber, to which he remarked that aJediwould not kill an unarmed man. However, non-Jedi Clone CaptainRexused his electrostaff to stab Agruss through the chest, killing him.

characters.name: Ahmar
characters.description: AhmarBiological informationGenderMaleDied19 BBY, NurBiographic informationOccupation/RankJedi(formerly)AffiliationJedi OrderGalactic EmpireInquisitorius Ahmarwas a Force-sensitive alien Jedi who survivedOrder 66and was recruited to serve theGalactic Empireas anInquisitor. He was brought toFortress Inquisitoriusfor training alongside fellow former JediDanteandBarriss Offee. However, Ahmar refused to serve the Empire and decided to escape the fortress instead. He was killed bythe Grand Inquisitoras he attempted to do so.

characters.name: Akar-Deshu
characters.description: Akar-DeshuBiological informationSpeciesMahranGenderMaleBiographic informationOccupation/RankJedi KnightAffiliationJedi OrderGalactic Republic Akar-Deshu(often called "Desh" by his friends) was a maleMahranwho served as aJedi Knightduring theClone Wars. A close friend toJedi MasterQuinlan Vos, Akar accompanied him on multiple missions during the war. Desh was a close friend of theJedi MasterQuinlan Vos, and the twoJediworked together on multiple missions. Shortly after theSeparatistattackonMahranee, Desh received instructions from theJedi High Councilto fetch Vos back to theJedi TempleonCoruscantfor a new assignment. Desh tracked Vos down toOtor's Hub, where the undercover Jedi Master was infiltrating theKoorivarmerchantSheb Valaad's black market operation, which specialized in selling merchandise that had been taken from murdered individuals. Desh stumbled on Vos, who was disguised as theKiffar"Tal Khar," in the middle of a meeting with Shed. Desh's arrival inadvertently exposed Vos' cover, who was forced to end his undercover mission early. Joining forces, the two Jedi used theirForce powersand lightsaber skills to knock out Sheb and his henchmen, who were promptly arrested by other Jedi reinforcements.

characters.name: Stass Allie
characters.description: Stass AllieBiological informationSpeciesTholothianGenderFemaleBiographic informationHomeworldTholothOccupation/RankJedi MasterJedi GeneralAffiliationJedi Order Stass Alliewas a survivor of the first battle of Geonosis and soon after became aJedi Generalin theGalactic Republicduring theClone Wars. She was the cousin of famed fellowTholothianJediAdi Galliaand took her place on the Jedi high council after her gruesome murder.

characters.name: Almec
characters.description: AlmecCurrentFormerBiological informationSpeciesHumanGenderMaleBiographic informationHomeworldMandaloreOccupation/RankPrime MinisterAffiliationNew Mandalorians(formerly)Shadow Collective Almecwas a male Mandalorian who was the Prime minister ofMandaloreduring theClone Wars. He was a member of the peaceful New Mandalorian faction. During the Clone Wars, Almec served the New Mandalorian government as Prime Minister, taking up residence in the New Mandalorian capital city of Sundari. A supporter of New Mandalorian ruler, DuchessSatine Kryze, Almec was a firm believer in the New Mandalorians' peaceful ways and did his best to watch over and represent the interests of Mandalore. His dedication to his people would be his undoing, however, as when Mandalore was cut off from Republic aid, Almec took it upon himself to establish a black market trade network of illicit smugglers to bring much-needed goods to the New Mandalorian people. These smugglers poisoned the people of Sundari with slabin-tainted tea, putting numerous children in the hospital. Almec was exposed as the leader of the black market network and the one responsible for the children's poisoning and was imprisoned for his crimes.

He was very snide and rude, which lead many to dislike him.

characters.name: Padmé Amidala
characters.description: Padmé AmidalaBiological informationSpeciesHuman(Naboo)GenderFemaleBorn46 BBY,NabooDied19 BBY,Polis MassaBiographic informationHomeworldNabooOccupation/RankQueen ofNaboo(formerly)Politician(formerly)Senator(formerly)AffiliationRoyal House of NabooGalactic Republic(formerly)Galactic EmpireImperial Senate(formerly)Padmé Amidalawas theSenatorof the planet ofNabooin theClone Wars. Once the Queen of Naboo, Padmé played an active role in theRepublichelping with a large variety of affairs during the war. Amidala was also the wife ofJedi KnightAnakin Skywalker. Their marriage was not publicly known and had to be kept secret since Jedi were not allowed to marry. As a fierce advocate for peace and diplomacy, the senator had many debates and clashes with factions in the Republic that sought to expand the conflict as opposed to ending the war all together. With the beginning of hostilities, Amidala's message of diplomacy and restraint was drowned out by the guns of war. She continued to find herself the target of Separatist assassins, which forced her to remain on the capital world. Amidala rarely saw her husband, Anakin Skywalker, who was constantly at the front line, leading clone troopers with Obi-Wan Kenobi. She maintained a secret correspondence with her husband, and, although she was thrilled about his exploits, Amidala also feared for his safety. Four months into the war, Amidala was traveling with Jedi Master Yoda aboard herH-type Nubian yachtwhen the ancient Jedi sensed a disturbance in the Force, coming from the planet Ilum. Despite Captain Typho's protests, she accompanied Yoda to the world and assisted in the rescue of the Jedi Luminara Unduli and her Padawan Barriss Offee, after battling against three chameleon droids, with some help from R2-D2 and C-3PO.

characters.name: Amis
characters.description: AmisBiological informationSpeciesHumanGenderMaleBiographic informationHomeworldMandaloreOccupation/RankStudentAffiliationNew MandaloriansAmiswas a Male student at an academy onMandaloreduring theClone Wars. He was one of the cadets, along withKorkie, who helped discover the source of corruption in the Mandalore government. After being instructed by Ahsoka Tano on the dangers of corruption in government, Amis and his friends, led by Korkie, explored the warehouse containing the food rations. While there, they discovered a black market deal and recorded it. Soon after, they were discovered and escaped. After accidentally revealing to Ahsoka what they had done, they went to Duchess Satine Kryze in the hopes she could discover and stop what was going on.

characters.name: Anchor Blue
characters.description: Anchor BlueBiological informationSpeciesHoukGenderMaleBiographic informationHomeworldLijuterOccupation/RankGladiatorAffiliationThe CauldronAnchor Bluewas a fierceHoukgladiator who fought atthe Cauldronagainst other gladiators on the Outer Rim planetRattatak. He did not rely solely on his natural size and strength, however. Anchor Blue's Rattataki patron installed a device in the base of the Houk's vibroblade. At a touch from a remote control, an electrical pulse would send pain through Blue's body. While in the arena, pain-induced rage made him a deadly fighter. Another setting would pump sedatives into Blue's bloodstream, calming him. Blue eventually became addicted to those sedatives, which allowed his patron total control over the gladiator. He was eventually killed byAsajj Ventress.

characters.name: Appo
characters.description: AppoBiological informationSpeciesHuman(Clone)GenderMaleBiographic informationHomeworldKaminoOccupation/RankClone sergeantClone Commander(Promoted)AffiliationGalactic Republic501st Legion Appo, designatedCC-1119, was aclone sergeantwho served with the501st Legionduring theClone Wars. He participated in theBattle of Umbara, one of the war's most lengthy campaigns. Appo was loyal to his commanding officer, even when placed under the command ofPong Krell, aJedi Masterwho was known to be both ruthless and reckless. Nonetheless, Appo's loyalty was ultimately to his brothers and the Republic and so participated in capturing Krell when the Jedi revealed himself to be a traitor.

characters.name: Faro Argyus
characters.description: Fargo ArgyusBiological informationSpeciesHumanGenderMaleBiographic informationHomeworldTepasiOccupation/RankCaptainSpyAffiliationRepublicSenate CommandoSeparatistsDuring the Clone Wars, CaptainFaro Argyuswas a senate commando who worked on board theTranquilityas a guard for ViceroyNute Gunray.  Argyus and several other commandos worked with JediLuminara UnduliandAhsoka Tanoto get Nute Gunray back to the Republic to trial him and put him in prison. During the flight, theTranquilitywas ambushed by Separatists lead byAsajj Ventress, who was trying to rescue Gunray. In their attempt to do so, they killed many clones and commandos but lost all of their forces except Ventress. Argyus gets Ahsoka to help Luminara defend against Dooku's agent only so he could betray the Republic in an attempt to free Gunray. He killed the rest of the commandos and distracted Gree long enough for Gunray to knock the clone commander unconscious, allowing the two to flee to the escape ship. Ventress meets up with the two and stabs Argyus through the back so she could take credit for the jailbreak. Argyus died instantly, bringing an end to the treasonous Senate Captain. Faro Argyus was traitorous, cunning, and sneaky, able to hide his true intentions of betraying the Republic from not only the other commandos and Commander Gree but two Jedi as well. He also believed that good soldiers did what they believed to be right, not just to follow orders.

He also believed that good soldiers did what they believed to be right, not just to follow orders.

characters.name: Faro Argyus
characters.description: Fargo ArgyusBiological informationSpeciesHumanGenderMaleBiographic informationHomeworldTepasiOccupation/RankCaptainSpyAffiliationRepublicSenate CommandoSeparatistsDuring the Clone Wars, CaptainFaro Argyuswas a senate commando who worked on board theTranquilityas a guard for ViceroyNute Gunray.  Argyus and several other commandos worked with JediLuminara UnduliandAhsoka Tanoto get Nute Gunray back to the Republic to trial him and put him in prison. During the flight, theTranquilitywas ambushed by Separatists lead byAsajj Ventress, who was trying to rescue Gunray. In their attempt to do so, they killed many clones and commandos but lost all of their forces except Ventress. Argyus gets Ahsoka to help Luminara defend against Dooku's agent only so he could betray the Republic in an attempt to free Gunray. He killed the rest of the commandos and distracted Gree long enough for Gunray to knock the clone commander unconscious, allowing the two to flee to the escape ship. Ventress meets up with the two and stabs Argyus through the back so she could take credit for the jailbreak. Argyus died instantly, bringing an end to the treasonous Senate Captain. Faro Argyus was traitorous, cunning, and sneaky, able to hide his true intentions of betraying the Republic from not only the other commandos and Commander Gree but two Jedi as well. He also believed that good soldiers did what they believed to be right, not just to follow orders.

He also believed that good soldiers did what they believed to be right, not just to follow orders.

characters.name: Armatan
characters.description: ArmatanBiological informationSpeciesHumanGenderMaleBiographic informationHomeworldMandaloreOccupation/RankMinister of the InteriorPrime Minister(formerly)AffiliationNew Mandalorians Armatanwas the Minister of the Interior of the New Mandalorians during theClone Wars. He was present at meetings held in theSundari Royal Palaceto discuss the dealings in the black market within their government. With the aid ofPadawanAhsoka Tano, when it was revealed that Prime MinisterAlmecwas at the center of the conspiracy, he was soon arrested, and Armatan then took his place as the new Prime Minister.

characters.name: Arok the Hutt
characters.description: ArokBiological informationSpeciesHuttGenderMaleBiographic informationHomeworldA-ForoonOccupation/RankMember of theHutt Grand CouncilAffiliationHutt ClanHutt Grand CouncilArok The Hutt, or simplyArok, was one of the fiveHuttsof theHutt Councilduring theClone Wars.  Around 21 BBY, Arok discussed the plans to releaseZirofrom Republic custody with other Hutt council members, includingJabba,Gorga the Hutt,Oruba, andMarlo, because Ziro had potentially damaging information about Hutt activities.
